CREATE TABLE test_uniq (id UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_uniq VALUES (1, 'apple'), (2, 'banana'), (3, 'apple'), (4, 'orange'), (5, 'banana');
SELECT uniq(value) FROM test_uniq;
SELECT uniq(value) AS unique_fruits FROM test_uniq WHERE id > 2;
SELECT id, uniq(value) AS unique_fruits FROM test_uniq GROUP BY id;
WITH (SELECT count(*) FROM test_uniq) AS total_count SELECT uniq(value) AS unique_fruits, total_count FROM test_uniq;
SELECT uniq(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_uniq WHERE id < 4) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_uniq2 (group_id UInt64, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY group_id;
INSERT INTO test_uniq2 VALUES (1, 'apple'), (1, 'banana'), (2, 'apple'), (2, 'orange');
SELECT g.group_id, uniq(g.value) AS unique_fruits FROM test_uniq2 g JOIN test_uniq t ON g.group_id = t.id GROUP BY g.group_id;
SELECT uniq(value) FROM test_uniq WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_uniq2 WHERE group_id = 1);
CREATE TABLE test_uniq3 (timestamp DateTime, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY timestamp;
INSERT INTO test_uniq3 VALUES (now(), 'fruit'), (now(), 'vegetable'), (now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, 'fruit');
SELECT uniq(category) FROM test_uniq3 WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT uniq(x) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value AS x FROM test_uniq);
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_uniq3) AS total, (SELECT uniq(category) FROM test_uniq3) AS unique_categories SELECT total, unique_categories;
SELECT uniq(value) FROM test_uniq WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM test_uniq LIMIT 3));
CREATE TABLE test_uniq4 (region String, sales UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY region;
INSERT INTO test_uniq4 VALUES ('North', 100), ('South', 150), ('East', 200), ('West', 150), ('North', 300);
SELECT region, uniq(sales) FROM test_uniq4 GROUP BY region;
SELECT total, uniq(sales) FROM (SELECT sum(sales) AS total FROM test_uniq4) AS totals;
SELECT uniq(sales) AS unique_sales FROM (SELECT sales FROM test_uniq4 WHERE sales > 100) AS filtered;
